description_long: This is a single-bladed axe with a broad, ornate metal head featuring intricate engravings and a slightly curved cutting edge. The blade is attached to a robust wooden handle that is ergonomically curved, providing a comfortable grip and better control. The lower portion of the handle is wrapped with a textured material, likely leather, to enhance grip and reduce slippage. The axe head has a pronounced poll on the opposite side of the blade, adding weight and balance. The overall design suggests a blend of functionality and decorative craftsmanship, making it suitable for both practical use and display. The materials and construction indicate durability, with the metal blade and wooden handle forming a sturdy combination.
description: A decorative, engraved metal-bladed axe with a curved wooden handle and a textured grip wrap. The design is both functional and visually striking.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top, showing the hexagonal shape of the poll and the narrow profile of the blade.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the ornate engravings on the blade, the curved wooden handle, and the textured grip wrap.
description_view_2: The back view displays the poll and the full length of the handle, with the blade edge barely visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the detailed blade engravings and the ergonomic handle curvature.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a rounded cross-section, ergonomic shape, and a textured leather grip wrap at the lower end.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad blade with a curved edge, pronounced beard, flat poll, and ornate engravings on the metal surface.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the handle and secured at the top.
